globalNews.title: Supreme Court's birthright ruling is major blow to Trump
globalNews.summary: The BBC’s Gary O’Donoghue explains what the court's landmark ruling means for the US president.

globalNews.title: US Supreme Court upholds bans on transgender women in female school and college sports
globalNews.summary: It rules that states can ban transgender athletes from competing in women's and girls' sports.

globalNews.title: Angry Venezuelans accuse government of negligence over earthquake response
globalNews.summary: People in areas devastated by twin earthquakes say they need more support from the government.

globalNews.title: Manhunt after bomb injures Ukrainian oligarch in Monaco
globalNews.summary: The blast was caused by an explosive device which appeared to contain bolts and pellets, the head of Monaco's government said.

globalNews.title: US envoys in Doha to meet mediators but not Iranians, Qatar says
globalNews.summary: Qatar's foreign ministry spokesman says no high-level meetings or direct talks between the US and Iran are scheduled.

cryptoNews.title: MetaMask launches stablecoin yield account with card spending
cryptoNews.summary: MetaMask launches Money Account it says offers up to 4% variable APY on mUSD stablecoin balances and card spending, with DeFi-powered yield via vaults, excluding the UK and EU.

cryptoNews.title: OKX launches AI marketplace for autonomous agent economy
cryptoNews.summary: OKX launched a beta marketplace for the agentic economy, enabling AI agents to autonomously find work and collaborate with other agents.

cryptoNews.title: Strategy's new plan divides industry observers even as MSTR, STRC climb
cryptoNews.summary: Strategy’s new Bitcoin capital framework draws Wall Street backing from Benchmark with a $570 per share target even as traders question long-term demand risk.

cryptoNews.title: Theo becomes first crypto-native investor in Fidelity tokenized fund
cryptoNews.summary: The onchain capital markets platform allocated $20 million to Fidelity International's tokenized liquidity fund as tokenized Treasury products continue to attract institutional capital.

cryptoNews.title: Swan's Cory Klippsten sees record Bitcoin holder supply revealing early bottom
cryptoNews.summary: The record Bitcoin supply held by long-term holders may suggest that the crypto market bottom will come early, according to Swan’s Cory Klippsten.

aiNews.title: X now offers an MCP server to make its platform easier for AI tools to use
aiNews.summary: X has launched a hosted MCP server, making it easier for developers to connect AI applications with the company’s API.

aiNews.title: Amazon launches new $1 billion FDE org, following OpenAI and Anthropic
aiNews.summary: Engineers on the new team will embed within companies to deploy purpose-built agents, focusing on fast deployments and customer self-sufficiency.

aiNews.title: Podcasting platform Riverside enters the newsletter publishing game
aiNews.summary: Users will be able use AI to create newsletters based on their recordings.

aiNews.title: Lumo, Proton’s privacy-focused AI chatbot, gets an upgrade
aiNews.summary: Proton's Lumo 2.0 is dropping this week, giving users a broader variety of capabilities.

aiNews.title: Crypto exchange OKX wants AI agents to hire and pay each other
aiNews.summary: OKX is bringing together payments, identity, and reputation into a marketplace for AI agents.

economicCalendar.description: Monthly jobs report - employment and wage data
Consumer Price Index - key inflation measure
Federal Reserve interest rate announcement and policy statement
